00001| // ==================== CONFIGURATION ====================
00002| 
00003| const API_BASE_URL = 'http://localhost:5000';
00004| const REFRESH_INTERVAL = 30000;
00005| let currentPeriod = 'month';
00006| let currentTab = 'dashboard';
00007| 
00008| console.log('=== SCRIPT LOADED ===');
00009| console.log('Current period:', currentPeriod);
00010| console.log('Current tab:', currentTab);
00011| 
00012| let costChart = null;
00013| let usageChart = null;
00014| let savingsChart = null;
00015| let costAnalysisChart = null;
00016| let appliancePowerChart = null;
00017| let roomComparisonChart = null;
00018| 
00019| // ==================== UTILITY FUNCTIONS ====================
00020| 
00021| function formatCurrency(value) {
00022|     return `$${parseFloat(value).toFixed(2)}`;
00023| }
00024| 
00025| function formatDate() {
00026|     const now = new Date();
00027|     const options = { month: 'long', year: 'numeric' };
00028|     return now.toLocaleDateString('en-US', options);
00029| }
00030| 
00031| // ==================== TAB SWITCHING ====================
00032| 
00033| function setupTabSwitching() {
00034|     console.log('=== SETUP TAB SWITCHING ===');
00035|     const navItems = document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item');
00036|     console.log('Found nav items:', navItems.length);
00037|     console.log('Nav items:', Array.from(navItems).map(item => item.getAttribute('data-tab')));
00038|     
00039|     navItems.forEach(item => {
00040|         item.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
00041|             e.preventDefault();
00042|             
00043|             const tabName = this.getAttribute('data-tab');
00044|             console.log('=== CLICKED TAB:', tabName, '===');
00045|             if (!tabName) return;
00046|             
00047|             if (tabName === currentTab) {
00048|                 console.log('Tab already active:', tabName);
00049|                 return;
00050|             }
00051|             
00052|             navItems.forEach(nav => {
00053|                 nav.classList.remove('active');
00054|                 console.log('Removed active from:', nav.getAttribute('data-tab'));
00055|             });
00056|             this.classList.add('active');
00057|             console.log('Added active to:', tabName);
00058|             
00059|             document.querySelectorAll('.tab-pane').forEach(pane => {
00060|                 pane.classList.remove('active');
00061|                 console.log('Hidden pane:', pane.id);
00062|             });
00063|             
00064|             const tabPane = document.getElementById(`tab-${tabName}`);
00065|             if (tabPane) {
00066|                 tabPane.classList.add('active');
00067|                 console.log('Shown pane:', tabPane.id);
00068|             }
00069|             
00070|             currentTab = tabName;
00071|             
00072|             refreshTab(tabName);
00073|         });
00074|     });
00075|     
00076|     console.log('Tab switching setup complete');
00077| }
00078| 
00079| function refreshTab(tabName) {
00080|     console.log('=== REFRESH TAB:', tabName, '===');
00081|     switch(tabName) {
00082|         case 'dashboard':
00083|             console.log('Refreshing dashboard...');
00084|             refreshDashboard();
00085|             break;
00086|         case 'cost':
00087|             console.log('Refreshing cost...');
00088|             fetchCostData();
00089|             break;
00090|         case 'appliances':
00091|             console.log('Refreshing appliances...');
00092|             fetchAppliancesData();
00093|             break;
00094|         case 'scheduler':
00095|             console.log('Refreshing scheduler...');
00096|             loadSchedulerData();
00097|             break;
00098|         case 'rooms':
00099|             console.log('Refreshing rooms...');
00100|             fetchRoomsData();
